title: Plushie Buddies
description: A light weight mod that adds plushies to your game.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/794741fb947bc376808eddb254e8c0e1bdc17293.png)
Plushie Buddies is a lightweight mod that adds plushies of all vanilla mobs and a few extras thrown into the mix! Currently, there are more than 80 plushies with more coming in the future. **You might be wondering how does one acquire the plushies?** To get your hands on our cute plushies, you will need to craft a Sewing table, where you will be able to make the plushies using our new items.
![Plushies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/885f8ba829a06f6f26383822cb3f208053ef1db7.png) ![Major Credits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e10106270545ac7bc2e820bfc095177e27f59f96.png) ![Translators](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d42766eafba74efa016d2c33ca7cdf0c5c7ed98f.png) Number_Sir junshengxie ![Other projects](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ce245ef60a485a17ebe2847f0fcae72ce94e9fa.png)
[**![Bisect](https://i.ibb.co/7NW2SY3/8d721697-200b-4168-81cd-f1daa8d8a680.png)**](https://bisecthosting.com/Subthy?r=PlushieBuddies)
